actionLanes.label: Open
actionLanes.reason: snapshot bridge creates an editable session from canonical package input

actionLanes.label: Select
actionLanes.reason: browser-only selection synchronizes tree, canvas, inspector, and status

actionLanes.label: Bridge replace
actionLanes.reason: selected plain text blocks can be replaced through the sandbox mutation bridge

actionLanes.label: Append text
actionLanes.reason: selected plain text blocks can receive explicit text.insert actions before caret typing is wired

actionLanes.label: Insert block
actionLanes.reason: sandbox mutation bridge can produce structural packet v1 for text-block insertion without structural UI controls

actionLanes.label: Delete node
actionLanes.reason: sandbox mutation bridge can produce structural packet v1 for core node deletion without durable history

actionLanes.label: Move node
actionLanes.reason: sandbox mutation bridge can produce structural packet v1 for core node reorder before structural toolbar UI

actionLanes.label: Apply packet
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime cache consumes packet-only mutation responses after boot

actionLanes.label: View index
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime derives lookup-first editor indexes from boot snapshots and packets

actionLanes.label: Runtime store
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime owns structural lookup indexes before structural packet application

actionLanes.label: Text packet store
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime applies bounded text packets directly to the structural store before full structural packets

actionLanes.label: Structure packet store
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime applies structural packet v1 to store indexes as a foundation bridge, not durable persistence

actionLanes.label: Structure UI
actionLanes.reason: browser inspector exposes bounded insert/delete/reorder controls that call sandbox structural packet routes

actionLanes.label: Structure policy
actionLanes.reason: browser structural commands derive availability, targets, routes, requests, and selection behavior from a DOM-free policy module

actionLanes.label: Outline jump
actionLanes.reason: browser outline navigation selects nodes through node-aware visible range requests and anchor restore

actionLanes.label: Diagnostics nav
actionLanes.reason: browser diagnostics navigation can jump node-linked issues through the same node-aware selection path

actionLanes.label: Render model
actionLanes.reason: browser rendering reads section roots and node content from the runtime store before viewport virtualization

actionLanes.label: Render window
actionLanes.reason: browser rendering derives the active render section/node window from the visible range before DOM viewport controllers

actionLanes.label: Render shell
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas keeps section placeholders for the full document while rendering only the active window in detail

actionLanes.label: Viewport measure
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can measure section shell boxes into normalized viewport facts without binding scroll control

actionLanes.label: Apply viewport
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can manually apply the current viewport measurement to the visible range before scroll binding

actionLanes.label: Scroll control
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can debounce settled scroll measurements into visible range requests before virtualized scheduling

actionLanes.label: Viewport anchor
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can keep a section-relative viewport anchor before node anchors and production scroll anchoring

actionLanes.label: Node anchor
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can restore selection jumps from node-aware viewport anchors

actionLanes.label: Section spacers
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can reuse measured section heights as shell spacers before virtualized rendering

actionLanes.label: Viewport predict
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can predict viewport section coverage from section spacer offsets before virtualized scheduling

actionLanes.label: Viewport candidate
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can dry-run scheduler section candidates before applying virtualized render scheduling

actionLanes.label: Apply candidate
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can manually gate scheduler candidates into visible-range requests before automatic scheduling

actionLanes.label: Scheduler runtime
actionLanes.reason: browser scheduler runtime tracks candidate sequence and stale apply guards before automatic scheduling

actionLanes.label: Auto scheduler
actionLanes.reason: browser scheduler can automatically apply budgeted runtime candidates before virtualization

actionLanes.label: Virtual sections
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can mount only virtual-stack sections while preserving section spacer geometry

actionLanes.label: Lazy detail
actionLanes.reason: browser canvas can defer heavy node detail inside mounted virtual sections

actionLanes.label: Viewport request
actionLanes.reason: browser viewport facts can produce visible range requests before DOM scroll measurement is wired

actionLanes.label: Visible range
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime derives bounded visible node ranges before viewport virtualization

actionLanes.label: Range request
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime records why a visible range is requested before scroll or viewport controllers

actionLanes.label: Draft
actionLanes.reason: safe text blocks can hold browser-local WYSIWYG drafts before commit through the sandbox bridge

actionLanes.label: Draft range
actionLanes.reason: active browser drafts track local textarea selection ranges without mutating canonical package state

actionLanes.label: Command ctx
actionLanes.reason: browser-local draft selection derives command target, range preview, and readiness before command execution

actionLanes.label: Text command
actionLanes.reason: browser-local insert and replace-selection commands update only the active draft before bridge commit

actionLanes.label: Set range
actionLanes.reason: browser-local range controls can set draft cursor and selection without mutating canonical package state

actionLanes.label: IME
actionLanes.reason: browser-local composition events guard draft commands and commit while IME input is active

actionLanes.label: Draft runtime
actionLanes.reason: browser-local draft state, caret selection, command readiness, text commands, and IME guards are owned by a browser-safe runtime module

actionLanes.label: Draft layout
actionLanes.reason: active browser drafts surface bounded local layout-preview summaries without requesting live or exact layout during typing

actionLanes.label: IME guard
actionLanes.reason: browser-local IME policy centralizes composition guards for draft commands, range controls, and commit without changing package state

actionLanes.label: Style patch
actionLanes.reason: browser-local inline style patch summaries model selected-range style intent without applying inline runs or core transactions

actionLanes.label: Toolbar state
actionLanes.reason: browser-local draft toolbar state exposes style control readiness without dispatching toolbar commands

actionLanes.label: Field chips
actionLanes.reason: browser-local field chip summaries expose catalog-backed caret insertion intent without applying inline field refs

actionLanes.label: History
actionLanes.reason: bridge actions append core authoring intent history records for future undo and audit

actionLanes.label: Live layout
actionLanes.reason: accepted sandbox mutations produce core live-layout request summaries without running exact layout

actionLanes.label: Undo
actionLanes.reason: sandbox text edits can be undone through bounded in-memory inverse text patches

actionLanes.label: Redo
actionLanes.reason: sandbox text edits can be redone through bounded in-memory text patches

actionLanes.label: Type
actionLanes.reason: text transaction UI waits for a stable selection/context boundary

actionLanes.label: Insert key
actionLanes.reason: field insertion will use inline.field-ref.insert after typing selection is wired

actionLanes.label: Diagnostics
actionLanes.reason: snapshot bridge calls generation readiness without rendering artifacts

actionLanes.label: Render
actionLanes.reason: exact layout, renderer, storage, and API route are intentionally absent
